calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-07-2010 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-07-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Murphy-Moore Properties, is present. Represented by Jacque Lecue.
Attorney, David Wasserman, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Florencio Zaragoza, is present.
Attorney, Dana Duffield, representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Judge Feinstein, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 210, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
This case settled, the trial date of OCT-12-2010 is vacated.
